text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day at training...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Phew... That's it for my cool down. Thanks for
today, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: All righty, I gotta hurry up and get ready.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Actually... The doughnut place in front of the
station is having an all-you-can-eat special today!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I had a light lunch in preparation for it, and now
I'm so hungry I could eat an elephant, hehe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna eat so many doughnuts that my belly
practically explodes!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm a little concerned about putting on weight,
but I should be fine if I work really hard during
tomorrow's training!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Wait a sec... Oh no! I just
remembered—tomorrow's the scrimmage!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I totally forgot about it... Way to go, doughnut
brain!
choice_data_list: Maybe you should go easy on the doughnuts.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
No, it's okay. I'm sure I'll be fine! I had a really
good training session today!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
If anything, I should eat a lot of doughnuts to
help get me all pumped up! Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Okay, I'm off! I'll see ya tomorrow, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, Special Week has a terrible
showing and loses the scrimmage.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sniffle...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I return to my room in the evening, I hear the
faint sound of someone crying.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I'm such an idiot! Sob...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Eek! T-Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry... I lost at the scrimmage, and I know it's
because I ate too many doughnuts.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't crying because I was frustrated by my
loss.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I was crying because I was angry at myself for
taking the race too lightly.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I thought I had become a serious racer when I put
on my signature racewear for the first time, but...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe I forgot how it felt then... And now
I'm the biggest idiot in the world!
choice_data_list: Let's take this experience and learn from it.
I went too easy on you as well.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Okay! From now on I'll treat all races seriously,
even scrimmages!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I don't ever wanna feel this way again. And I don't
want to disappoint you either, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I've cried enough, so all that's left now is to run
like there's no tomorrow! In fact, I'm gonna do
some solo training right now!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Trainer... Thank you! Let's give it our all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She regains her original enthusiasm and the
sounds of her footsteps echo in the tranquil
evening air around the track.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, if I ever sound like I'm not taking things
seriously...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Or if I forget what it was like when I first put on
my signature racewear, then I hope you put me
back on track!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Great! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
All righty! Now I'm gonna go run and get my
motivation back!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is a good reminder to Special Week that it's
no easy task to make your dreams come true.
